title: How Monday is used by two companies
excerpt: I’m a manager at a smaller company that uses Monday, but we have a larger vendor who uses Monday as well. I would like to know if the user I am inviting already has a Monday account will that affect the amount of guests/…

posts.author: bapos (baposdo)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m a manager at a smaller company that uses Monday, but we have a larger vendor who uses Monday as well. I would like to know if the user I am inviting already has a Monday account will that affect the amount of guests/users I am allowed to invite. I.E. I know three guests can count as one user.
